result.preview:
"SQLite query execution error (DatabaseError): Execution failed on sql '
SELECT 
    o.Id as OrderId,
    o.AccountId,
    o.EffectiveDate,
    oi.Id as OrderItemId,
    oi.Product2Id,
    p.Name as ProductName,
    oi.Quantity,
    oi.UnitPrice
FROM Order o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId
JOIN Product2 p ON oi.Product2Id = p.Id
WHERE o.AccountId = '#001Wt00000PGXrNIAX'
    AND o.EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-01'
    AND o.EffectiveDate < '2021-07-01'
    AND (p.Name LIKE '%AI%' OR p.Name LIKE '%processing%')
ORDER BY o.EffectiveDate DESC
': near "Order": syntax error"

args.query:
SELECT 
    "Order".Id as OrderId,
    "Order".AccountId,
    "Order".EffectiveDate,
    OrderItem.Id as OrderItemId,
    OrderItem.Product2Id,
    Product2.Name as ProductName,
    OrderItem.Quantity,
    OrderItem.UnitPrice
FROM "Order"
JOIN OrderItem ON "Order".Id = OrderItem.OrderId
JOIN Product2 ON OrderItem.Product2Id = Product2.Id
WHERE "Order".AccountId = '#001Wt00000PGXrNIAX'
    AND "Order".EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-01'
    AND "Order".EffectiveDate < '2021-07-01'
    AND (Product2.Name LIKE '%AI%' OR Product2.Name LIKE '%processing%')
ORDER BY "Order".EffectiveDate DESC

args.query:
SELECT 
    "Order".Id as OrderId,
    "Order".AccountId,
    "Order".EffectiveDate,
    OrderItem.Id as OrderItemId,
    OrderItem.Product2Id,
    Product2.Name as ProductName,
    Product2.Description as ProductDescription

ORDER BY "Order".EffectiveDate DESC

args.query:
SELECT 
    o.Id as OpportunityId,
    o.Name as OpportunityName,
    o.AccountId,
    o.ContactId,
    o.StageName,
    o.CloseDate,
    o.CreatedDate,
    o.Description
FROM Opportunity o
WHERE o.ContactId = '003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR'
    AND o.CloseDate >= '2021-06-01'
    AND o.CloseDate < '2021-07-01'
ORDER BY o.CloseDate DESC
